info.description: REST API for football match and team data with HATEOAS and JWT authentication
info.title: Football API

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token
Create a new user account with username and password

get.description: Get all matches between two specific teams
Get all matches with pagination support

post.description: Create a new match result (requires authentication)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific match

put.description: Update an existing match record (requires authentication)

delete.description: Delete a match by ID (requires authentication)

get.description: Get all goals scored in the specified match

post.description: Record a new goal for a match

201.description: Single created goal wrapped in a GoalsResponse collection

delete.description: Remove a goal record from a match

get.description: Get the penalty shootout result for a match

post.description: Record a penalty shootout result for a match

delete.description: Remove a penalty shootout record from a match

get.description: Get all goals scored by a specific player
Returns a paginated snapshot of global Elo rankings, optionally filtered by region

post.description: Triggers background Elo recalculation (admin). Optionally scoped to one team.

parameters.description: Force recalculation even if cache is current
parameters.name: force

429.description: Recalculation already running or rate limit exceeded

get.description: Get all national teams with HATEOAS links

post.description: Create a new national team (requires authentication)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific team

delete.description: Delete a team by ID (requires authentication)

get.description: Returns the World Football Elo rating for a team, optionally at a historical date
Returns the full time-series of Elo rating changes for a team
Get historical names for a specific team
Get all football tournaments ordered by name

Bearer.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
Bearer.name: Authorization
